verses.latin_vulgate: Oratio ipsi David.   Inclina, Domine, aurem tuam et exaudi me,  quoniam inops et pauper sum ego.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּפִלָּ֗ה לְדָ֫וִ֥ד הַטֵּֽה־יְהֹוָ֣ה אׇזְנְךָ֣ עֲנֵ֑נִי כִּֽי־עָנִ֖י וְאֶבְי֣וֹן אָֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Bow down thine ear, O Lord, hear me: for I am poor and needy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Custodi animam meam, quoniam sanctus sum ;  salvum fac servum tuum, Deus meus, sperantem in te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׇׁ֥מְרָ֣ה נַפְשִׁי֮ כִּֽי־חָסִ֢יד אָ֥֫נִי הוֹשַׁ֣ע עַ֭בְדְּךָ אַתָּ֣ה אֱלֹהַ֑י הַבּוֹטֵ֥חַ אֵלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Preserve my soul; for I am holy: O thou my God, save thy servant that trusteth in thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miserere mei, Domine,  quoniam ad te clamavi tota die ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חׇנֵּ֥נִי אֲדֹנָ֑י כִּ֥י אֵלֶ֥יךָ אֶ֝קְרָ֗א כׇּל־הַיּֽוֹם׃
verses.king_james: Be merciful unto me, O Lord: for I cry unto thee daily.

verses.latin_vulgate: lætifica animam servi tui,  quoniam ad te, Domine, animam meam levavi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׂ֭מֵּחַ נֶ֣פֶשׁ עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּ֥י אֵלֶ֥יךָ אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י נַפְשִׁ֥י אֶשָּֽׂא׃
verses.king_james: Rejoice the soul of thy servant: for unto thee, O Lord, do I lift up my soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam tu, Domine, suavis et mitis,  et multæ misericordiæ omnibus invocantibus te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה אֲ֭דֹנָי ט֣וֹב וְסַלָּ֑ח וְרַב־חֶ֝֗סֶד לְכׇל־קֹֽרְאֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: For thou, Lord, art good, and ready to forgive; and plenteous in mercy unto all them that call upon thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Auribus percipe, Domine, orationem meam,  et intende voci deprecationis meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַאֲזִ֣ינָה יְ֭הֹוָה תְּפִלָּתִ֑י וְ֝הַקְשִׁ֗יבָה בְּק֣וֹל תַּחֲנוּנוֹתָֽי׃
verses.king_james: Give ear, O Lord, unto my prayer; and attend to the voice of my supplications.

verses.latin_vulgate: In die tribulationis meæ clamavi ad te,  quia exaudisti me.
verses.king_james: In the day of my trouble I will call upon thee: for thou wilt answer me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non est similis tui in diis, Domine,  et non est secundum opera tua.
verses.king_james: Among the gods there is none like unto thee, O Lord; neither are there any works like unto thy works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes gentes quascumque fecisti venient,  et adorabunt coram te, Domine,  et glorificabunt nomen tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־גּוֹיִ֤ם ׀ אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשִׂ֗יתָ יָב֤וֹאוּ ׀ וְיִשְׁתַּחֲו֣וּ לְפָנֶ֣יךָ אֲדֹנָ֑י וִ֖יכַבְּד֣וּ לִשְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: All nations whom thou hast made shall come and worship before thee, O Lord; and shall glorify thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam magnus es tu, et faciens mirabilia ;  tu es Deus solus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־גָד֣וֹל אַ֭תָּה וְעֹשֵׂ֣ה נִפְלָא֑וֹת אַתָּ֖ה אֱלֹהִ֣ים לְבַדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: For thou art great, and doest wondrous things: thou art God alone.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deduc me, Domine, in via tua, et ingrediar in veritate tua ;  lætetur cor meum, ut timeat nomen tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֘וֹרֵ֤נִי יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ דַּרְכֶּ֗ךָ אֲהַלֵּ֥ךְ בַּאֲמִתֶּ֑ךָ יַחֵ֥ד לְ֝בָבִ֗י לְיִרְאָ֥ה שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Teach me thy way, O Lord; I will walk in thy truth: unite my heart to fear thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitebor tibi, Domine Deus meus, in toto corde meo,  et glorificabo nomen tuum in æternum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוֹדְךָ֤ ׀ אֲדֹנָ֣י אֱ֭לֹהַי בְּכׇל־לְבָבִ֑י וַאֲכַבְּדָ֖ה שִׁמְךָ֣ לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: I will praise thee, O Lord my God, with all my heart: and I will glorify thy name for evermore.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia misericordia tua magna est super me,  et eruisti animam meam ex inferno inferiori.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־חַ֭סְדְּךָ גָּד֣וֹל עָלָ֑י וְהִצַּ֥לְתָּ נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י מִשְּׁא֥וֹל תַּחְתִּיָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: For great is thy mercy toward me: and thou hast delivered my soul from the lowest hell.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, iniqui insurrexerunt super me,  et synagoga potentium quæsierunt animam meam :  et non proposuerunt te in conspectu suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ זֵ֘דִ֤ים קָמוּ־עָלַ֗י וַעֲדַ֣ת עָ֭רִיצִים בִּקְשׁ֣וּ נַפְשִׁ֑י וְלֹ֖א שָׂמ֣וּךָ לְנֶגְדָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: O God, the proud are risen against me, and the assemblies of violent men have sought after my soul; and have not set thee before them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tu, Domine Deus, miserator et misericors ;  patiens, et multæ misericordiæ, et verax.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה אֲ֭דֹנָי אֵל־רַח֣וּם וְחַנּ֑וּן אֶ֥רֶךְ אַ֝פַּ֗יִם וְרַב־חֶ֥סֶד וֶאֱמֶֽת׃
verses.king_james: But thou, O Lord, art a God full of compassion, and gracious, longsuffering, and plenteous in mercy and truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Respice in me, et miserere mei ;  da imperium tuum puero tuo,  et salvum fac filium ancillæ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּנֵ֥ה אֵלַ֗י וְחׇ֫נֵּ֥נִי תְּנָֽה־עֻזְּךָ֥ לְעַבְדֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝הוֹשִׁ֗יעָה לְבֶן־אֲמָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: O turn unto me, and have mercy upon me; give thy strength unto thy servant, and save the son of thine handmaid.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fac mecum signum in bonum,  ut videant qui oderunt me, et confundantur :  quoniam tu, Domine, adjuvisti me, et consolatus es me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲשֵֽׂה־עִמִּ֥י א֗וֹת לְט֫וֹבָ֥ה וְיִרְא֣וּ שֹׂנְאַ֣י וְיֵבֹ֑שׁוּ כִּֽי־אַתָּ֥ה יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה עֲזַרְתַּ֥נִי וְנִחַמְתָּֽנִי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Shew me a token for good; that they which hate me may see it, and be ashamed: because thou, Lord, hast holpen me, and comforted me.
